phaseGoal: Schema + read-only display de ProjectRoadmap. Manual SQL pode preencher; UI mostra current roadmap se existe, ou empty state. Approve funciona + share token. Entrega mais que o sistema atual (zero release planning hoje).

userStories.title: Criar 6 migrations atômicas do schema PlanningSession
userStories.description: Cria 6 migrations em supabase/migrations/ (20260601a..20260601f) conforme §7 do PRD. Cada migration tem 1 CREATE TABLE ou 1 trigger. Inclui CHECK constraints, RLS policies, índices, e trigger de auto-supersede.
acceptanceCriteria: psql roda todas em ordem sem erro
Índice parcial idx_planning_session_one_approved garante 1 approved por projeto

verifiable.command_or_query: source <(grep '^DIRECT_URL=' .env | sed 's/^/export /') && psql "$DIRECT_URL" -f supabase/migrations/20260601a_planning_session.sql && psql "$DIRECT_URL" -f supabase/migrations/20260601b_project_roadmap.sql && psql "$DIRECT_URL" -f supabase/migrations/20260601c_roadmap_phase.sql && psql "$DIRECT_URL" -f supabase/migrations/20260601d_roadmap_phase_prd.sql && psql "$DIRECT_URL" -f supabase/migrations/20260601e_roadmap_milestone.sql && psql "$DIRECT_URL" -f supabase/migrations/20260601f_planning_session_auto_supersede.sql
verifiable.expected: CREATE TABLE / CREATE INDEX / CREATE POLICY / CREATE TRIGGER (no error)

verifiable.command_or_query: SELECT count(*) FROM pg_tables WHERE tablename IN ('PlanningSession','ProjectRoadmap','RoadmapPhase','RoadmapPhasePRD','RoadmapMilestone');
SELECT count(*) FROM pg_policies WHERE tablename IN ('PlanningSession','ProjectRoadmap','RoadmapPhase','RoadmapPhasePRD','RoadmapMilestone');

userStories.title: Regenerar database.types.ts
userStories.description: Após rodar migrations, regenerar src/lib/supabase/database.types.ts via supabase gen types ou ferramenta equivalente do projeto. Verificar que as 5 tabelas aparecem como TypeScript interfaces.
acceptanceCriteria: Types pra PlanningSession, ProjectRoadmap, RoadmapPhase, RoadmapPhasePRD, RoadmapMilestone existem

userStories.title: DAL de PlanningSession (read + create básico)
userStories.description: Criar src/lib/dal/planning-session.ts exportando: getCurrentRoadmap(projectId), listSessions(projectId), getSession(sessionId), createSession(projectId, title, parentSessionId?). Hidrata joins de phases/PRDs/milestones quando relevante. Respeita RLS — não usa service role.
acceptanceCriteria: Cada fn respeita RLS (não faz bypass via service role)
getCurrentRoadmap retorna null se não há approved version

userStories.title: API routes básicas (POST session, GET roadmap, GET session)
userStories.description: 3 routes: POST /api/projects/[id]/planning-sessions, GET /api/projects/[id]/roadmap/current, GET /api/planning-sessions/[id]. Validação via Zod. Auth via proxy.ts existente. Lead+ é exigido para POST.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/projects/:id/planning-sessions retorna 201 com sessionId quando lead+
GET /api/projects/:projectId/roadmap/current retorna roadmap atual ou 404 quando none
GET /api/planning-sessions/:id retorna session com phases/PRDs/milestones inline
Lead+ exigido para POST (testado com viewer recebe 403)

verifiable.command_or_query: Smoke test via curl + cookie sessão lead
verifiable.expected: 201 em POST; 200 em GET com session válida

userStories.title: Página /projects/[id]/planning (read-only listing)
userStories.description: Server component renderizando current roadmap se existe (phases/PRDs/milestones em layout vertical), ou empty state 'Nenhum roadmap aprovado ainda. [Criar PlanningSession]'. Lista histórico de versions abaixo. Reusa primitives existentes (Card, Badge).
acceptanceCriteria: Mostra current roadmap se existe (com phases + PRDs + milestones)
Mostra empty state se não existe
Lista histórico de versions com data de approval

verifiable.expected: renders sem 500; empty state ou roadmap

phaseExit: Owner pode criar PlanningSession manual (sem agentes ainda), preencher phases/PRDs/milestones via API ou SQL direto, approve funciona, share token é gerado, página /projects/[id]/planning mostra roadmap atual. Phase 2 começa quando Fase 1 verifiable AC todos passam.

nextPhase.phaseGoal: Editor UI com drag/drop, milestones CRUD, conflict detection, approve flow com closeout (move PRDs filesystem).
stories: PLANNING-006: Board primitive — phases as columns
PLANNING-007: Drag/drop entre phases com useOptimisticCollection
PLANNING-011: Approve flow + closeout (move PRDs filesystem)
